column1: Figure 3. Soil C stock (Mg C ha^-1) within each incremental soil depth (a) or mass (b); values are mean +/- one standard error of the six plots for each pasture and eucalyptus pair. Significant Student's t-test results comparing the means between pairs for each depth or mass increment are shown; ** indicates p < 0.05 and * indicates p < 0.10; actual p-values are listed for significant differences.
